---
name: New Device Request
about: Request support for a new MIDI device
title: '[Device] '
labels: new-device
assignees: ''
---

**Device name and manufacturer**
<!-- e.g. Akai EWI Solo -->

**Protocol family**
<!-- CC-only / SysEx bank-based / Mixed / Unknown -->

**Available documentation**
<!-- What do you have? Check all that apply -->
- [ ] MIDI implementation chart
- [ ] SysEx specification
- [ ] Packet captures from official editor
- [ ] Raw device traffic logs
- [ ] User manual with MIDI details

**Are you willing to contribute the plugin?**
- [ ] Yes, I can create the plugin JSON
- [ ] I can help test but not author
- [ ] No, just requesting

**Additional context**
<!-- Links to manuals, firmware versions, known quirks, etc. -->
